languages.text: "Я не знаю. Это устройство древнее, чем само человечество — кто знает на что еще оно способно? Стазис способен лишь замедлить его эффекты".
"I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."
languages.original_text: "Я не знаю. Это устройство древнее, чем само человечество — кто знает на что еще оно способно? Стазис способен лишь замедлить его эффекты".

traits.locale_text: "I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."
"I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."
"I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."

languages.text: «Lo desconozco. Este artefacto es más antiguo que la propia Humanidad; ¿quién sabe de qué más es capaz? La suspensión solo puede ralentizar sus efectos».
languages.original_text: "I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."

traits.locale_text: «Lo desconozco. Este artefacto es más antiguo que la propia Humanidad; ¿quién sabe de qué más es capaz? La suspensión solo puede ralentizar sus efectos».

languages.text: “我不知道。这装置比人类本身还要古老，谁知道它还有别的什么力量？静滞力场只能减缓它的效应。”
languages.original_text: "I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."

traits.locale_text: “我不知道。这装置比人类本身还要古老，谁知道它还有别的什么力量？静滞力场只能减缓它的效应。”

languages.text: « Je l'ignore. Cet appareil est plus ancien que l'humanité, qui sait de quoi d'autre il est capable ? La stase ne peut que ralentir ses effets. »
languages.original_text: "I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."

traits.locale_text: « Je l'ignore. Cet appareil est plus ancien que l'humanité, qui sait de quoi d'autre il est capable ? La stase ne peut que ralentir ses effets. »

languages.text: "Bilmiyorum. Bu cihaz, İnsanlığın kendisinden bile yaşlı. Başka neler yapabileceğini kim bilebilir? Staz, sadece etkilerini yavaşlatabiliyor."
languages.original_text: "I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."

traits.locale_text: "Bilmiyorum. Bu cihaz, İnsanlığın kendisinden bile yaşlı. Başka neler yapabileceğini kim bilebilir? Staz, sadece etkilerini yavaşlatabiliyor."

languages.text: "Ich weiß es nicht. Dieses Gerät ist älter als die Menschheit selbst ... wer weiß, wozu es noch in der Lage ist? Stase kann seine Effekte lediglich verlangsamen."
languages.original_text: "I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß es nicht. Dieses Gerät ist älter als die Menschheit selbst ... wer weiß, wozu es noch in der Lage ist? Stase kann seine Effekte lediglich verlangsamen."

languages.text: 「分かりません。この装置は人類そのものよりも古い――ほかに何ができるのか、誰に分かりましょう？ ステイシスは、その作用を遅らせることしかできません」
languages.original_text: "I don't know. This device is older than Humanity itself — who knows what else it is capable of? Stasis can only slow its effects."

traits.locale_text: 「分かりません。この装置は人類そのものよりも古い――ほかに何ができるのか、誰に分かりましょう？ ステイシスは、その作用を遅らせることしかできません」
